protocol_personalization_notes: Use this file as a retrieval and ranking prior for protocol personalization, not as a stand-alone prescribing source.
Always resolve candidate protocols back to the authoritative condition package and device-specific governance before export.
Top literature-weighted modalities for this condition are general_neuromodulation, spinal_cord_stimulation, transcranial_magnetic_stimulation.
Highest-support protocol cluster in the imported bundle is general_neuromodulation targeting unspecified_target.
Most frequent safety-monitoring signals in matched papers are pain_or_discomfort, device_complication, pediatric_caution.
This evidence snapshot uses the broad chronic_pain literature tag and currently backs the narrower chronic-pain-fibromyalgia package.
